question: I'm going back to our previous chat about the Lost Temple of the Djinn one-shot. Can you remind me how many mummies the party will face in the temple?

runs.response_text: In the "Lost Temple of the Djinn" one-shot, the party will face 4 mummies as one of the enemy encounters within the temple.
There are 4 mummies in the Lost Temple of the Djinn one-shot.
